case_title: SEPAN-SHIRABAD, SEVAN VS ZINDARSIAN, ANNIG et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY SEPAN-SHIRABAD, SEVAN AS TO DEFENDANT ZINDARSIAN, ANNIG ANTABLIAN, ROSTOM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
